hero.tagline_accent: Different perspectives. Sourced facts. Your own conclusion.
hero.stance: We don't claim to be neutral. We show how a story is being told, and let you decide.
hero.description_before: Big news platforms filter, simplify, and polarize, often without realising it. kebab.news does things differently: inspired by
hero.description_after: , but focused on the German-speaking world. We put the same story side by side across the political spectrum, surface framing differences, and link to primary sources where available. Later, the community will help decide which topics get a deeper dive.

radar.page_subtitle: The same story, side by side, across the political spectrum. Framing is annotated on the headlines themselves — never rewritten.
radar.empty: No stories yet. The radar fills in once the first feeds update.
radar.no_blind_spots: No blind spots — every political camp covered this.

artikel.page_subtitle: AI-generated neutral versions of selected stories. The original sources are linked below every article.
artikel.disclaimer_body: Unverified. Automatically rewritten in neutral language based on the original sources linked below. The editorial team does not fact-check.
artikel.sources_subheading: These outlets covered the story. Click to read the original — framing annotations are visible on the headlines.
